policy: LG seed claims are promoted only from OpenDART annual financial-statement API rows at this stage. IR and value-up PDF sources remain in the narrative claim queue until a human reviewer promotes atomic claims with evidence locators.
localPdfStatus: Local official PDFs are extracted and queued for human claim review. They are not runtime knowledge in this financial seed slice.

records.claimText: LG이노텍은 2025년 4분기 매출 7.610조원, 영업이익 3,247억원, 영업이익률 4.3%, 순이익 1,359억원을 제시했고, 매출과 영업이익은 전년 동기 대비 각각 14.8%, 31.0% 증가했다.

reviewApprovedPromotion.policy: User-approved claim review proposals are promoted as bounded runtime source-backed claims without deleting prior financial or narrative seeds.
